description_long: This doll features a whimsical, cartoonish design with a round head, large red cheeks, and wide, red-rimmed eyes that give it a slightly mischievous appearance. It wears a striped shirt in alternating red and blue, accented by two large white buttons, and matching striped pants. The doll's head is topped with a propeller beanie hat, also striped in red and blue, with a white propeller on top. Its arms are extended outward, ending in exaggerated, splayed fingers, and it has brown shoes. The mouth is wide and toothy, with a pronounced jawline and visible teeth, and the back of the head is smooth with a brown hair section. The overall look is playful yet slightly unsettling, reminiscent of vintage wind-up toys or carnival mascots.
description: A colorful, cartoonish doll with a striped propeller beanie, wide red eyes, and a toothy grin, dressed in a red and blue striped outfit with brown shoes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's wide red eyes, toothy grin, striped beanie with propeller, and outstretched arms with splayed fingers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the doll's pronounced jawline, visible teeth, and the side profile of the striped beanie and brown hair.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the smooth back of the head, brown hair section, and the back of the striped shirt and pants.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the jawline, teeth, and the side of the beanie and hair.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is dressed in a short-sleeved, red and blue vertically striped shirt with two large white buttons, matching striped pants, and brown shoes. The outfit is playful and reminiscent of classic circus or carnival attire, completed with a matching striped propeller beanie hat.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both arms extended outward at shoulder height, fingers splayed. The legs are straight and close together, and the head faces forward.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a wide, toothy grin, large open red eyes with white pupils, and round red cheeks, giving it a fixed, smiling, and slightly mischievous expression.
attribute_hair_style: Short, smooth brown hair covering the sides and back of the head, visible beneath the beanie hat.
